The '''suuri''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Crustacean/Legends|crustacean]]<ref name="Hunted" /> that was native to [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]. It was one of the main sources of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] for the [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnans]], who preferred to catch it live.<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> When prepared [[Boiled suuri|boiled]], the shell should always be cracked first to release trapped steam pockets.<ref name="TEGtD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> Some suuri were sold in the markets of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Hunted" />
